SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.resource
Interface ResourceEvent<T>

All Superinterfaces:
MediaEvent<T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
MixerEvent, PlayerEvent, RecorderEvent, SdpPortManagerEvent, SignalDetectorEvent, SignalGeneratorEvent, SpeechRecognitionEvent, VideoRendererEvent
public interface ResourceEvent<T>
extends MediaEvent<T>

A Resource sends a ResourceEvent to notify the application.
ResourceEvent objects are delivered to a MediaEventListener.

When a media resource method (for a Player, Recorder, etc.) completes successfully, it returns a ResourceEvent to the invoking program. A ResourceEvent can also be unsolicited, when the cause is external. In both cases, the ResourceEvent can be queried for additional information.

ResourceEvent properties:

Each resource event has read-only properties: an EventType, an Error or a Qualifier, and possibly an RTCTrigger. ResourceEvent defines getter methods for each.

If a media resource generates events that have additional fields, then the event interface for that resource extends ResourceEvent by defining methods to access the additional information.

Field Summary
static Trigger MANUAL_TRIGGER
          The Trigger returned by getRTCTrigger() when ResourceContainer.triggerAction(Action) is called.
static Qualifier NO_QUALIFIER
          Returned when no Qualifier is applicable (for example, when an error occurred).
static Qualifier RTC_TRIGGERED
          Qualifier: Completion caused by a Run-Time Control.
static Qualifier STOPPED
          Qualifier: Completion caused by a Stop.
 
Fields inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaEvent
NO_ERROR
 
Method Summary
 Qualifier getQualifier()
          Get additional information about how/why a transaction terminated, the reason that causes this event.
 Trigger getRTCTrigger()
          Get the RTC Trigger that caused this transaction completion.
 
Methods inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaEvent
getError, getErrorText, getEventType, getSource, isSuccessful
 

Field Detail

STOPPED

static final Qualifier STOPPED
Qualifier: Completion caused by a Stop. Normal response from operations stopped by <resource>.stop() or MediaGroup.stop() method.

RTC_TRIGGERED

static final Qualifier RTC_TRIGGERED
Qualifier: Completion caused by a Run-Time Control.

NO_QUALIFIER

static final Qualifier NO_QUALIFIER
Returned when no Qualifier is applicable (for example, when an error occurred).

MANUAL_TRIGGER

static final Trigger MANUAL_TRIGGER
The Trigger returned by getRTCTrigger() when ResourceContainer.triggerAction(Action) is called.

Method Detail

getQualifier

Qualifier getQualifier()
Get additional information about how/why a transaction terminated, the reason that causes this event.

Standard return values are one of:
RTC_TRIGGERED, STOPPED
which indicate the reason or mode of completion. Other Qualifier's may be documented in the resource event classes.

If the associated method or transaction did not succeed, this methods returns NO_QUALIFIER; use MediaEvent.getError() instead.

Returns:
one of the Qualifier's

getRTCTrigger

Trigger getRTCTrigger()
Get the RTC Trigger that caused this transaction completion. This is non-null if and only if getQualifier() returns RTC_TRIGGERED.

Returns:
a Trigger identifying an RTC trigger condition.
